name: Petra
description: An ancient city carved into rose-red cliffs, famous for its rock-cut architecture.

name: Kyoto
description: Known for its classical Buddhist temples, gardens, and imperial palaces.

name: Santorini
description: Stunning volcanic island featuring white-washed houses and blue-domed churches.

name: Machu Picchu
description: An ancient Incan citadel set high in the Andes Mountains, known for its dry-stone walls.

name: Paris
description: The city of light, famous for the Eiffel Tower, world-class museums, and romantic cafes.

name: Bali
description: Tropical paradise known for its forested volcanic mountains and iconic rice paddies.

name: Rome
description: A cosmopolitan city with nearly 3,000 years of globally influential art and architecture.

name: Cairo
description: Home to the Giza Pyramid Complex and the Great Sphinx, rich in ancient history.

name: Swiss Alps
description: Breathtaking mountain range offering world-class skiing, hiking, and alpine scenery.

name: Great Barrier Reef
description: The world's largest coral reef system, perfect for diving and exploring marine life.

name: New York City
description: Known for its iconic skyscrapers, Broadway shows, and diverse culture.

name: Cape Town
description: A port city beneath the imposing Table Mountain, offering beaches and nature.

name: Reykjavik
description: Coastal capital known for the Northern Lights, geothermal spas, and dramatic landscapes.
